title: Ashen's Zombie Apocalypse
body:
![Ashen's Zombie Apocalypse](https://i.imgur.com/HZxo7Dc.png)

# Features:

- Zombies can place and destroy blocks, wich depends on wich tool the zombie is holding.
- Zombies can swim.
- Rotten zombies can throw rotten flesh at you.
- Zombies can sprint.
- Zombies can jump over 2 block or below gaps.
- Rotten zombies will slowly backup if the player is close.
- Customizable settings in a custom GUI, type /trigger Give_Gui to use the GUI menu.
- Zombies can jump up and bite you.
- Zombies run away from TNT.
- Zombies replace most hostile mobs, and some neutral mobs, wich is customizable in settings.
- Zombies can carry TNT.
- Cave traders, to make caves more enjoyable.
- And more!
